transcripts:
Coach: How is your project going?
Client: Great progress on the deliverables. We hit our sprint goals last week and the team is feeling confident.
Coach: What contributed most to that success?
Client: Better communication and daily standups helped us stay aligned.

Coach: What challenges are you facing?
Client: Time management is my biggest struggle. I have too many meetings and not enough deep work time.
Coach: How might you restructure your calendar?
Client: I could block off mornings for focused work and batch meetings in the afternoon.
